queries.question: For every streaming service, list the monetization models they use.
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , monetization_model.model_name from Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model join Monetization_Model on Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model.monetization_model_id = Monetization_Model.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?model_name WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_monetization_model a :Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model .
  ?monetization_model a :Monetization_Model .
  ?streaming_service_monetization_model p:hasMonetization_Model ?monetization_model .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_monetization_model p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?monetization_model p:model_name ?model_name .
}

queries.question: What monetization model is common to all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Monetization_Model.model_name  from Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model join Monetization_Model on Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model.monetization_model_id = Monetization_Model.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model.monetization_model_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Monetization_Model.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the monetization models that each streaming service uses.
